info.title: nuget-cert-extractor
info.description: A tool to extract certificate files from NuGet packages. Contains the nuget-cert-extractor .NET CLI tool.

options.name: --file
options.description: A file path for an input .nupkg.

options.name: --output
options.description: A destination directory for writing extracted certificates to

options.name: --format
options.description: The format to use for writing certificate files [default: CER]

options.name: --author
options.description: Extract certificates used in the author signature

options.name: --repository
options.description: Extract certificates used in the repository signature

options.name: --code-signing
options.description: Extract certificates used in code sign signatures

options.name: --timestamping
options.description: Extract certificates used in timestamp signatures

options.name: --log-level
options.description: The minimum log level to display. Possible values: Verbose, Debug, Information, Warning, Error, Fatal [default: Information]
